negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: common_sense_6f84d217-537a-430d-9739-d7553410cbed
prompt: A heartwarming scene unfolds in a cozy, large beige oval-shaped pet bed with plush tan cloths draped over it, creating a serene and comfortable setting. At the center of this nurturing environment lies an adorable pug, lying down with its body relaxed and front legs stretched out slightly forward. The pug's fur is an apricot fawn texture with light portions and a touch of black extending from its head to its tail, while its ears are entirely black. Its large dark eyes shift slightly, often glancing to its left or downward. Beside the pug, four fluffy ducklings are huddled closely against its left side, their bright yellow feathers contrasting beautifully with the neutral tones of the bed and the dog. The ducklings exhibit gentle motion, occasionally pecking at the pug's fur or nuzzling into its side.  As the video progresses, a bright flash appears, causing the pug to widen its eyes swiftly. Another flash is directed toward the animals, prompting the middle duckling to move to the left. The dog looks a bit toward it, adding a touch of curiosity to the tender moment. The soft, indirect lighting enhances the tranquil atmosphere, highlighting the textures of the pug's fur and the downy fluff of the ducklings. The background showcases a dark wooden floor illuminated by a cool-toned light, with slightly visible sticks. The camera remains steady throughout, capturing the gentle and heartwarming interaction between the pug and the ducklings.
